case_title: RICHARD KERZIC VS. COMPUTACENTER FUSIONSTORM, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-08-2020 CONTINUED TO APR-08-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). ***NOTE: REQUESTS FOR STAYS ARE HEARD IN DEPT. 302.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 65556775) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KERZIC, RICHARD AN INDIVIDUAL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-19-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
